hero.title: Free Water for Everyone
hero.subtitle: Join our mission to make clean, free water accessible to communities worldwide

home.welcomeSubtitle: Empowering communities through free, clean water
home.missionText: We believe that access to clean water is a fundamental right. Our mission is to provide free, clean drinking water to communities in need.
home.heroSubtitle: From mountain springs to your hands — in 100% recyclable tetrapacks.

gratis.title: GRATIS — Premium Hydration for a Purpose
gratis.subtitle: Three revolutionary beverage lines. Infinitely recyclable aluminum bottles. 100% advertising revenue donated to verified NGOs worldwide.
gratis.badge: G.R.A.T.I.S — Giving Resources to Achieve Transformative and Impactful Change
gratis.waterDesc: Premium natural spring water in infinitely recyclable aluminum bottles. Pure hydration, zero compromise.
gratis.theurgyDesc: Mystic-positioned functional water infused with adaptogens, vitamins, and natural botanicals. Elevate your hydration ritual.
gratis.theurgyTagline: Transform. Harmonize. Elevate. Unite. Revive. Grace. Yield.
gratis.fuDesc: Caffeine-powered energy water with rebellious attitude. For those who refuse to settle. Fuel your fire.

tribePage.title: TRIBE — Our Values
tribePage.subtitle: Born from the belief that every sip should serve a greater purpose.
tribePage.description2: GRATIS isn't just water. It's a movement built on authenticity, respect, and responsibility. Explore the values that drive everything we do.

heritage.title: Heritage
heritage.description: Born from street culture. Built on authenticity. Discover the origin story that shaped our mission.

ethics.title: Ethics
ethics.description: Fair trade, cultural respect, and community investment. Our commitment to doing right by everyone.

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.description: Real-time tracking, verified impact, and independent audits. Every euro accounted for.

team.title: Team
team.description: Meet the diverse crew building GRATIS. Real people from the culture, creating something authentic.

standards.title: Standards
standards.description: Quality without compromise. Safety you can trust. Excellence in every bottle we produce.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: Environmental commitments that protect the planet that sustains us all. Action over words.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Open books, public financials, and radical transparency. No secrets, no spin—just facts.
